Paionios

1 work in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
Nike of Paionios
by Paionios
Classical Greek · Paionios · c. 420 BCE · Olympia
The Messenians and Naupactians dedicated her at Olympia after a victory over Sparta. Nike lands on a plinth, wind pressing drapery against her body — 170 years before the Winged Victory of Samothrace.
←Ali Riza, the "Bodleian Painter" Afghanistan or Pakistan→
